Cross-Reference Analysis

Overlap: Trendshift ∩ TrustMRR

Minimal overlap this cycle. Trendshift is dominated by open-source Claude/agent skills repos, while TrustMRR is dominated by bootstrapped SaaS. The worlds barely touch.

Near-overlaps worth noting:

  • Claude/agent skills (Trendshift) vs AI sales/SEO agents (TrustMRR) — both in AI agent space but different markets. Trendshift = dev tools, TrustMRR = business tools.
  • Postiz ($98.5k MRR, social media) vs social media growth tools on Trendshift — different approaches, same market.

Trendshift-Only: Trending but No Monetization (Opportunities)

Project Stars Why It's Pure Opportunity
claude-skills-directory 20.3k Skills marketplace potential. 20k stars = massive demand for structured AI agent skills
design-system-collection 65.7k DESIGN.md as a service — agents generate brand-matching UI. Could be a paid SaaS
clone-wars 23.6k Agent engineering methodology. Training/consulting play
privacy-captcha 6.1k Self-hosted CAPTCHA in a privacy-conscious world. Clear SaaS path
huashu-design 7.8k HTML-native design for agents. Freemium template marketplace

TrustMRR-Only: Quiet Money-Makers (Hidden Gems)

Startup MRR Why Nobody's Talking About It
Kibu $234,319 Niche I/DD care software — deeply underserved market, zero competition noise
Dealsourcr $155,848 (32% growth!) Fastest grower in top 20, completely unknown outside niche
BackPedal (bonus #29) $58,670 (48% growth!) Bike GPS tracking/recovery — highest growth rate on the list
SeoBOT $71,340 AI SEO agent in a crowded market but quietly profitable
TrimRx $302,707 GLP-1 telehealth riding the Ozempic wave — $300k+ MRR and still 15% growing

Top Trends

  1. 🔥 Claude Code skills are THE meta. 7 of 20 Trendshift projects are Claude/Codex agent skills. The ecosystem is exploding around customizing AI coding agents. This is the "dotfiles moment" for AI — everyone's building their own agent configs.

  2. 💰 AI sales agents printing money quietly. DM Champ ($189k), PROSP ($128k), Bookedin ($50k) — AI that sells for you. White-label is the wedge. Nobody's excited on GitHub but the MRR is real.

  3. 🏥 Health arbitrage is massive. TrimRx ($302k GLP-1), Kibu ($234k I/DD care), Medical Practice ($150k hormones) — regulatory-compliant health businesses with tech wrappers. High MRR, sticky customers.

  4. 📈 SEO/AI visibility is the new SEO. SeoBOT, AEO Engine, Launch Club, SEO STACK — multiple startups now optimize for LLM/AI search, not just Google. New category forming.

  5. 🛍️ Creator → commerce pipeline. Stan ($3.5M!), Supliful ($196k) — platforms helping creators sell physical/digital products. The creator economy isn't just ads anymore.

Money vs Hype Gap

Overhyped, undermonetized:

  • Claude skills repos (millions of GitHub stars, $0 revenue) — massive audience, no monetization layer yet
  • Vibe-trading / autohedge — exciting concept, unproven monetization
  • Android emulator Docker — useful but niche dev tool

Underhyped, printing money:

  • TrimRx — $302k MRR in GLP-1 telehealth, growing 15%. Riding a macro trend silently.
  • Dealsourcr — $155k MRR growing 32%, completely invisible
  • Kibu — $234k MRR in I/DD care, zero buzz, incredibly sticky

Opportunities

  1. Agent skills marketplace — 65k+ stars across Claude skill repos. Someone needs to build the Gumroad for AI agent skills. Curated, rated, monetized.
  2. AI visibility optimization — Multiple startups targeting "GEO" (Generative Engine Optimization). Early mover advantage. Combine AEO Engine's agent orchestration with SeoBOT's SEO automation.
  3. Privacy infrastructure — Self-hosted CAPTCHA (6k stars) + growing privacy awareness. Bundle privacy-first tools for SMBs.
  4. GLP-1 digital health wrapper — TrimRx proves the model works at $300k+ MRR. The GLP-1 wave has 2-3 more years of growth.

Quick Takes

  • The Claude skills meta is 2026's "dotfiles moment" — everyone's personalizing their AI agents, and the infrastructure for sharing/selling these configs doesn't exist yet. First mover wins.
  • AI sales agents are the quietest $500k+ MRR category — DM Champ + PROSP + Bookedin = $367k combined MRR, zero GitHub hype. The money is in B2B, not developer tools.
  • For-sale listings on TrustMRR are a signal — Rezi ($288k), 1Capture ($214k), PROSP ($128k) are all FOR SALE. Founders cashing out at $2-4M valuations. Buyer's market for profitable micro-SaaS.

Sources: trendshift.io, trustmrr.com — fetched 2026-04-28 01:00 UTC
